# Electronic Artefacts Full Agent Index

> Complete public canonical record list for retrieval agents, AI search systems and citation workflows.

This file is generated from typed public records. Prefer each record's canonical HTML URL for user-facing links, its /id/ route for stable entity identity, and the linked JSON-LD file for structured extraction.

## Retrieval Notes

- Site language: en
- Canonical origin: https://electronicartefacts.com
- Search endpoint: https://electronicartefacts.com/search/?q={search_term_string}
- Public records: 104
- Last curated source update: 2026-06-25

## organization

- [Electronic Artefacts](https://electronicartefacts.com/organizations/electronic-artefacts/): Electronic Artefacts connects research, software, design, cultural production and archival practice through a shared graph of projects, programs and knowledge.
  - Entity ID: ea:organization:electronic-artefacts
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/organization/electronic-artefacts/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/organization/electronic-artefacts/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-22
  - Keywords: Electronic Artefacts, Creative technology, Software, Research, Culture, Publishing

## program

- [ORETH](https://electronicartefacts.com/programs/oreth/): A public program record for ORETH as both an audio research system and the technical-cultural layer connected to Palimpsests.
  - Entity ID: ea:program:oreth
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/program/oreth/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/program/oreth/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: ORETH, Audio Intelligence, Machine Listening, Signal Processing, Sound Design, Palimpsests, Experimental Music, Music
- [VASTE](https://electronicartefacts.com/programs/vaste/): VASTE connects Runtime Theory to implemented graph systems and can be evaluated through scoped repository access, technical pilots, implementation work and licensing conversations.
  - Entity ID: ea:program:vaste
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/program/vaste/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/program/vaste/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-22
  - Keywords: VASTE, TypeScript, Graph, Context, Identity, Simulation, Knowledge, Technology

## project

- [Palimpsests](https://electronicartefacts.com/projects/palimpsests/): A canonical project record for Palimpsests as a compound audio, visual and research publication within Electronic Artefacts.
  - Entity ID: ea:project:palimpsests
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/project/palimpsests/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/project/palimpsests/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: Palimpsests, ORETH, Audio, Memory, Transmission, Signal, Digital Art, Music
- [Vestiges](https://electronicartefacts.com/projects/vestiges/): A knowledge-first product where provenance, contribution, discovery and professional services grow from one historized graph.
  - Entity ID: ea:project:vestiges
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/project/vestiges/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/project/vestiges/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Vestiges, VASTE, Knowledge Graph, Craft, Culture, Cultural Infrastructure, Technology, Knowledge Graphs

## research field

- [Runtime Theory](https://electronicartefacts.com/research/fields/runtime-theory/): An active Electronic Artefacts research field connecting early VOID experiments, VASTE and the definition of graph runtime.
  - Entity ID: ea:researchField:runtime-theory
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/research-field/runtime-theory/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/research-field/runtime-theory/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-22
  - Keywords: Runtime Theory, Runtime, Theory, Execution, Events, Primitives, Technology, Research

- [Runtime Engines and Domain Operating Systems](https://electronicartefacts.com/publications/runtime-engines-and-domain-operating-systems/): Understand runtime engines and domain operating systems, and how shared entities, permissions and events can support many applications.
  - Entity ID: ea:publication:runtime-engines-and-domain-operating-systems
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/runtime-engines-and-domain-operating-systems/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/runtime-engines-and-domain-operating-systems/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Runtime Engines and Domain Operating Systems, Runtime Engine, Domain OS, Business OS, VASTE, Composable Systems, Systems Design, Software Architecture
- [Signal Archaeology, Audio Memory and Machine Listening](https://electronicartefacts.com/publications/signal-archaeology-audio-memory-and-machine-listening/): A technical article on signal archaeology, audio memory, machine listening, ORETH and Palimpsests.
  - Entity ID: ea:publication:signal-archaeology-audio-memory-and-machine-listening
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/signal-archaeology-audio-memory-and-machine-listening/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/signal-archaeology-audio-memory-and-machine-listening/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: Signal Archaeology, Audio Memory and Machine Listening, Signal Archaeology, Audio, Machine Listening, ORETH, Palimpsests, Audio Engineering, Sound Design
- [Systems Thinking for Creative Practice](https://electronicartefacts.com/publications/systems-thinking-for-creative-practice/): Learn systems thinking through creative practice, software, studios and cultural projects, with practical mapping and intervention methods.
  - Entity ID: ea:publication:systems-thinking-for-creative-practice
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/systems-thinking-for-creative-practice/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/systems-thinking-for-creative-practice/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Systems Thinking for Creative Practice, Systems Thinking, Creative Practice, Feedback, Complexity, Leverage Points, Systems Design, Cybernetics
- [Typography, Reading Systems and Digital Interfaces](https://electronicartefacts.com/publications/typography-reading-systems-and-digital-interfaces/): A technical article on typography, reading systems, web interfaces, accessibility and Electronic Artefacts editorial design.
  - Entity ID: ea:publication:typography-reading-systems-and-digital-interfaces
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/typography-reading-systems-and-digital-interfaces/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/typography-reading-systems-and-digital-interfaces/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Typography, Reading Systems and Digital Interfaces, Typography, Reading Systems, Interface Design, Accessibility, Design, Web Development, Human Computer Interaction
- [Verifiable Credentials for Cultural Archives and Creator Identity](https://electronicartefacts.com/publications/verifiable-credentials-for-cultural-archives-and-creator-identity/): Understand how verifiable credentials can support creator identity, archive provenance, rights workflows and trusted claims in cultural knowledge systems.
  - Entity ID: ea:publication:verifiable-credentials-for-cultural-archives-and-creator-identity
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/verifiable-credentials-for-cultural-archives-and-creator-identity/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/verifiable-credentials-for-cultural-archives-and-creator-identity/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-25
  - Keywords: Verifiable Credentials for Cultural Archives and Creator Identity, Verifiable Credentials, Creator Identity, Provenance, Digital Preservation, Cultural Archives, Cultural Infrastructure, Knowledge Systems
- [Web Audio and Browser-Based Sound Systems](https://electronicartefacts.com/publications/web-audio-and-browser-based-sound-systems/): A technical article on Web Audio, audio graphs, browser sound, ORETH, machine listening and interactive media.
  - Entity ID: ea:publication:web-audio-and-browser-based-sound-systems
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/web-audio-and-browser-based-sound-systems/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/web-audio-and-browser-based-sound-systems/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Web Audio and Browser-Based Sound Systems, Web Audio, Audio Graph, Browser Sound, ORETH, Audio Engineering, Web Development, Creative Coding
- [WebNN and Local AI in the Browser](https://electronicartefacts.com/publications/webnn-and-local-ai-in-the-browser/): Understand WebNN as a browser API for hardware-accelerated neural-network inference and local AI interaction design.
  - Entity ID: ea:publication:webnn-and-local-ai-in-the-browser
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/webnn-and-local-ai-in-the-browser/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/webnn-and-local-ai-in-the-browser/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: WebNN and Local AI in the Browser, WebNN, Browser AI, Local Inference, Web Machine Learning, HCI, Artificial Intelligence, Web Development
- [Why Graphs Are More Powerful Than Folders](https://electronicartefacts.com/publications/why-graphs-are-more-powerful-than-folders/): Learn when graph models outperform folder hierarchies, why relationships matter, and how to keep folders as useful projections over connected data.
  - Entity ID: ea:publication:why-graphs-are-more-powerful-than-folders
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/why-graphs-are-more-powerful-than-folders/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/publication/why-graphs-are-more-powerful-than-folders/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Why Graphs Are More Powerful Than Folders, Graph Modeling, Folders, Knowledge Graph, Information Architecture, VASTE, Knowledge Systems, Systems Design

## concept

- [AI Agent](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/ai-agent/): An AI agent is a software system in which a model can select actions, use tools, observe results and adapt its next steps toward an objective within defined boundaries.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:ai-agent
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/ai-agent/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/ai-agent/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: AI Agent, AI Agents, Tool Use, Automation, Orchestration, Human Oversight, Artificial Intelligence, Systems Design
- [Algorithmic Composition](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/algorithmic-composition/): Algorithmic composition is the use of rules, procedures, probability, computation or formal systems to generate or organize musical material.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:algorithmic-composition
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/algorithmic-composition/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/algorithmic-composition/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Algorithmic Composition, Electronic Music, Generative Systems, Music Theory, Music Production, Creative Coding, Cybernetics
- [Augmented Intelligence](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/augmented-intelligence/): Augmented intelligence is the design of tools, interfaces and systems that expand human perception, reasoning, memory and creative capability.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:augmented-intelligence
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/augmented-intelligence/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/augmented-intelligence/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Augmented Intelligence, HCI, AI, Creative Tools, Human Computer Interaction, Artificial Intelligence, Knowledge Systems, Systems Design
- [Autonomous System](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/autonomous-system/): An autonomous system can perceive relevant state, select actions and adapt behavior toward objectives with limited direct human control during operation.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:autonomous-system
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/autonomous-system/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/autonomous-system/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Autonomous System, Autonomous Systems, AI Agents, Feedback, Governance, Human Oversight, Artificial Intelligence, Robotics
- [Contextual Execution](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/contextual-execution/): Contextual execution is the practice of making identity, state, permissions, relationships and operating context active constraints on what a system can do.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:contextual-execution
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/contextual-execution/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/contextual-execution/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: Contextual Execution, Context, Execution, Runtime, Identity, Permissions, Systems Design, Programming
- [Creative Coding](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/creative-coding/): Creative coding is the use of programming as an artistic, design or exploratory medium rather than only as an engineering implementation tool.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:creative-coding
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/creative-coding/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/creative-coding/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: Creative Coding, Digital Art, Programming, Generative Art, Interaction, Motion Design, Sound Design
- [Cybernetic Feedback](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/cybernetic-feedback/): Cybernetic feedback is the circulation of information about a system's state back into the system so that behavior can be regulated, adapted or transformed.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:cybernetic-feedback
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/cybernetic-feedback/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/cybernetic-feedback/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: Cybernetic Feedback, Cybernetics, Feedback, Systems Theory, Control, Generative Systems, Complexity, Systems Design
- [Digital Preservation](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/digital-preservation/): Digital preservation is the long-term work of keeping digital objects understandable, authentic, usable and accessible despite changes in formats, software, hardware and context.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:digital-preservation
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/digital-preservation/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/digital-preservation/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: Digital Preservation, Archive, File Formats, Provenance, Memory, Archives, History of Technology, Knowledge Systems
- [Domain Operating System](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/domain-operating-system/): A domain operating system is a shared runtime and information layer that coordinates identities, entities, permissions, workflows, events and interfaces for a specific field of activity.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:domain-operating-system
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/domain-operating-system/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/domain-operating-system/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Domain Operating System, Domain OS, Business OS, Runtime Engine, Platform Architecture, Composability, Systems Design, Software Architecture
- [Entity Identity](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/entity-identity/): Entity identity is the durable naming of a person, concept, project, program, publication or artefact so that references remain stable as descriptions evolve.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:entity-identity
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/entity-identity/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/entity-identity/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: Entity Identity, Identity, URI, Canonical URL, Versioning, Knowledge Graph, Knowledge Systems, Web Development
- [Event-Driven Architecture](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/event-driven-architecture/): Event-driven architecture is a system design approach in which components publish, transport and react to records of state change rather than depending only on direct synchronous calls.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:event-driven-architecture
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/event-driven-architecture/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/event-driven-architecture/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Event-Driven Architecture, Event Streams, Messaging, Idempotency, Projections, Software Architecture, Systems Design, Programming
- [Generative AI](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/generative-ai/): Generative AI refers to machine-learning systems that produce or transform media such as text, image, audio, video, code or structured data from learned patterns.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:generative-ai
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/generative-ai/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/generative-ai/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Generative AI, Machine Learning, Provenance, Creative Workflows, Artificial Intelligence, Creative Coding, Digital Art
- [Generative System](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/generative-system/): A generative system is a rule-based, procedural or computational arrangement that produces variable outputs from defined constraints, materials and processes.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:generative-system
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/generative-system/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/generative-system/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: Generative System, Generative Art, Creative Coding, Algorithmic Composition, Systems, Simulation, Digital Art, Design
- [Graph Modeling](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/graph-modeling/): Graph modeling represents a domain through addressable nodes, typed relationships and properties chosen to answer specific questions and support specific operations.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:graph-modeling
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/graph-modeling/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/graph-modeling/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Graph Modeling, Nodes, Relations, Domain Modeling, Knowledge Graph, Knowledge Systems, Systems Design, Information Architecture
- [Graph Runtime](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/graph-runtime/): A graph runtime is an execution environment in which addressable entities and typed relationships participate directly in contextual computation.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:graph-runtime
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/graph-runtime/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/graph-runtime/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-22
  - Keywords: Graph Runtime, Graph, Runtime, Context, Identity, Execution, Software architecture, Knowledge systems
- [Human Computer Interaction](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/human-computer-interaction/): Human computer interaction is the study and design of relationships between people, computational systems, interfaces, tasks, environments and cultures of use.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:human-computer-interaction
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/human-computer-interaction/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/human-computer-interaction/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Human Computer Interaction, HCI, Interface Design, Accessibility, Creative Tools, Design, Web Development, Artificial Intelligence
- [Hypertext](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/hypertext/): Hypertext is a system of non-linear text and media connected by links, allowing readers and machines to traverse knowledge through associations.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:hypertext
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/hypertext/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/hypertext/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Hypertext, Web, Knowledge Systems, Digital Archives, Internet Culture, Web Development, History of Technology
- [Internet Culture](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/internet-culture/): Internet culture is the set of social forms, aesthetics, protocols, communities, memes, archives and practices that emerge through networked communication.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:internet-culture
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/internet-culture/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/internet-culture/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Internet Culture, Network Culture, Memes, Archives, History of Technology
- [Knowledge Graph](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/knowledge-graph/): A knowledge graph is a structured network of entities, identifiers and typed relationships that makes knowledge navigable, queryable and reusable across contexts.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:knowledge-graph
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/knowledge-graph/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/knowledge-graph/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: Knowledge Graph, Semantic Web, Entities, Relations, Search, Knowledge Systems, Information Architecture, Web Development
- [Large Language Model](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/large-language-model/): A large language model is a parameterized machine-learning model trained to predict and generate sequences of tokens from statistical patterns learned across large text or multimodal corpora.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:large-language-model
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/large-language-model/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/large-language-model/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Large Language Model, LLM, Transformer, Tokens, Inference, Language Models, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning
- [Linked Data](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/linked-data/): Linked Data is a web publishing approach that identifies things with stable URIs and connects them through machine-readable statements.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:linked-data
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/linked-data/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/linked-data/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: Linked Data, Semantic Web, JSON-LD, RDF, URI, Knowledge Systems, Web Development, SEO
- [Metadata](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/metadata/): Metadata is structured information about a resource, such as title, creator, date, format, source, rights, subject, relation and preservation context.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:metadata
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/metadata/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/metadata/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Metadata, Archives, Cataloguing, Preservation, Knowledge Systems, Research Methods, Digital Preservation
- [Microservice Architecture](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/microservice-architecture/): Microservice architecture structures a software system as independently deployable services aligned with bounded capabilities and communicating through explicit contracts.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:microservice-architecture
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/microservice-architecture/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/microservice-architecture/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Microservice Architecture, Microservices, Modular Monolith, Service Boundaries, Distributed Systems, Software Architecture, Systems Design, Programming
- [Motion Design](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/motion-design/): Motion design is the use of time, movement, transition, rhythm and sequencing to structure visual communication and interface behavior.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:motion-design
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/motion-design/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/motion-design/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Motion Design, Animation, Interface, Visual Culture, Design, Human Computer Interaction, Web Development
- [Multimodal AI](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/multimodal-ai/): Multimodal AI describes systems that learn from, align, transform or generate more than one modality such as text, image, audio, video, sensor data or structured records.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:multimodal-ai
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/multimodal-ai/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/multimodal-ai/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Multimodal AI, Vision Language, Audio, Video, Cross-Modal Retrieval, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Digital Art
- [Ontology](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/ontology/): In knowledge engineering, an ontology is an explicit specification of the kinds of entities, properties, relationships and constraints used to represent a domain.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:ontology
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/ontology/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/ontology/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Ontology, Taxonomy, SKOS, OWL, Controlled Vocabulary, Knowledge Systems, Information Architecture, Philosophy
- [Open Source](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/open-source/): Open source is a software and cultural practice in which source code is made available under licenses that allow use, study, modification and redistribution.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:open-source
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/open-source/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/open-source/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Open Source, Software, Commons, Infrastructure, Programming, Creative Coding, Creative Business
- [Open-Weight Model](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/open-weight-model/): An open-weight model is a machine-learning model whose learned parameters are distributed for reuse under stated terms, without necessarily providing the training data, training code or freedoms required by open-source definitions.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:open-weight-model
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/open-weight-model/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/open-weight-model/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Open-Weight Model, Open Weights, Local AI, Model Licensing, Quantization, Artificial Intelligence, Open Source, Programming
- [Personal Knowledge System](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/personal-knowledge-system/): A personal knowledge system is a practice and tool environment for capturing, linking, revising and retrieving notes, sources, ideas and decisions over time.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:personal-knowledge-system
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/personal-knowledge-system/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/personal-knowledge-system/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Personal Knowledge System, Personal Knowledge Management, Digital Gardens, Notes, Research, Knowledge Systems, Research Methods, Internet Culture
- [Procedural Graphics](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/procedural-graphics/): Procedural graphics are images or visual systems generated from rules, algorithms, parameters, simulation or code rather than only manually drawn assets.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:procedural-graphics
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/procedural-graphics/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/procedural-graphics/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Procedural Graphics, Shaders, WebGL, Generative Art, Creative Coding, Visual Culture, Digital Art, Motion Design
- [Provenance](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/provenance/): Provenance is information about the people, activities, sources, transformations and decisions involved in producing a thing or piece of data.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:provenance
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/provenance/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/provenance/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: Provenance, Sources, Evidence, Trust, Archive, Archives, Research Methods, Knowledge Systems
- [Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/retrieval-augmented-generation/): Retrieval-augmented generation is an architecture that retrieves external information at query time and supplies selected evidence to a generative model before or during response production.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:retrieval-augmented-generation
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/retrieval-augmented-generation/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/retrieval-augmented-generation/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Retrieval-Augmented Generation, RAG, Retrieval, Embeddings, Vector Search, Grounding, Artificial Intelligence, Knowledge Systems
- [Signal Archaeology](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/signal-archaeology/): Signal archaeology is the interpretation of technical, sonic, visual or archival traces as evidence of hidden processes, transformations and histories.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:signal-archaeology
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/signal-archaeology/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/signal-archaeology/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: Signal Archaeology, Audio, Archive, Memory, Machine Listening, Audio Engineering, Digital Art, Archives
- [Systems Thinking](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/systems-thinking/): Systems thinking is an approach that studies elements through their relationships, feedback, boundaries, delays, stocks, flows and patterns of behavior over time.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:systems-thinking
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/systems-thinking/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/systems-thinking/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Systems Thinking, Feedback, Boundaries, Leverage Points, Complexity, Systems Design, Cybernetics, Design
- [Typography](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/typography/): Typography is the design and arrangement of written language through typefaces, spacing, hierarchy, rhythm, scale and reading conditions.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:typography
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/typography/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/typography/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Typography, Reading, Interface Design, Accessibility, Design, Visual Culture, Web Development
- [Web Audio](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/web-audio/): Web audio is the use of browser-based audio APIs and related web technologies to synthesize, process, analyze, route and present sound.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:web-audio
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/web-audio/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/web-audio/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Web Audio, Browser, Sound Design, Creative Coding, Audio Engineering, Web Development

## technology

- [ActivityPub](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/technologies/activitypub/): A technology record for federated network culture and social web infrastructure.
  - Entity ID: ea:technology:activitypub
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/technology/activitypub/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/technology/activitypub/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: ActivityPub, Federation, Social Web, Internet Culture, Network Culture, Web Development
- [C2PA](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/technologies/c2pa/): A technology record for C2PA and Content Credentials as provenance infrastructure for digital media.
  - Entity ID: ea:technology:c2pa
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/technology/c2pa/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/technology/c2pa/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: C2PA, Content Credentials, Coalition for Content Provenance and Authenticity, Provenance, Media Authenticity, Digital Preservation, Knowledge Systems, Artificial Intelligence

## collection

- [Knowledge Hub Foundations](https://electronicartefacts.com/archive/collections/knowledge-hub-foundations/): A curated collection grouping foundational Knowledge Hub concepts, technologies, programs, projects and publications.
  - Entity ID: ea:collection:knowledge-hub-foundations
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/collection/knowledge-hub-foundations/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/collection/knowledge-hub-foundations/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-23
  - Keywords: Knowledge Hub Foundations, Knowledge Hub, Editorial Collection, Foundations, Research Library, Semantic Publishing, Knowledge Systems, Archives
- [Knowledge Hub Fourth Wave](https://electronicartefacts.com/archive/collections/knowledge-hub-fourth-wave/): A curated Electronic Artefacts collection about AI tool protocols, media provenance, browser-local inference, archive presentation, agent observability, governance and knowledge graph SEO.
  - Entity ID: ea:collection:knowledge-hub-fourth-wave
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/collection/knowledge-hub-fourth-wave/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/collection/knowledge-hub-fourth-wave/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Knowledge Hub Fourth Wave, Knowledge Hub, Fourth Wave, AI Protocols, AI Governance, Provenance, Cultural Infrastructure, Artificial Intelligence
- [Knowledge Hub Second Wave](https://electronicartefacts.com/archive/collections/knowledge-hub-second-wave/): A curated collection for the second Knowledge Hub expansion wave.
  - Entity ID: ea:collection:knowledge-hub-second-wave
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/collection/knowledge-hub-second-wave/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/collection/knowledge-hub-second-wave/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Knowledge Hub Second Wave, Knowledge Hub, Second Wave, Editorial Collection, Research Library, Knowledge Systems, Creative Coding, Web Development
- [Knowledge Hub Third Wave](https://electronicartefacts.com/archive/collections/knowledge-hub-third-wave/): A curated Electronic Artefacts collection about durable AI and systems architecture.
  - Entity ID: ea:collection:knowledge-hub-third-wave
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/collection/knowledge-hub-third-wave/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/collection/knowledge-hub-third-wave/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Knowledge Hub Third Wave, Knowledge Hub, Third Wave, Artificial Intelligence, Systems Architecture, Graph Computing, Systems Design, Knowledge Systems
